changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT (Day 16 16:04):
- Iran: Trump threatens Kharg Island ‘just for fun’. 42K+ civilian sites damaged. Araghchi claims strikes from UAE. Copycat drone info war. Zero diplomacy.
- Israel-Lebanon: 4 more killed overnight. West Bank family killing. 826+ dead.
- Russia-Ukraine: 68 missiles + 282 bombs + 9,222 drones. 740 KIA. US ceasefire talks stalled. Prolonged war likely.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: 118K displaced. No ceasefire.
- TEN trackers at imminent/critical. Zero diplomatic progress.

latest_news.headline: Trump threatens to hit Kharg Island again ‘just for fun’ — Iran responds
latest_news.text: Trump says US may hit Kharg Island “a few more times just for fun.” Previously said only military targets. Araghchi: strikes launched from Ras Al-Khaimah and near Dubai.

latest_news.headline: Iran reveals 42,000+ civilian sites damaged from US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.text: Govt spokesperson says US-Israeli strikes have damaged more than 42,000 civilian sites across Iran. Scale of destruction revealed on Day 16.

latest_news.headline: Russia hammers Ukraine: 68 missiles + 282 guided bombs + 9,222 drones in 24h
latest_news.text: 144 combat engagements. Russia lost 740 personnel. Ukraine intercepted 90/97 overnight drones. 4 tanks, 17 artillery systems lost by Russia.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills Palestinian couple and two children in West Bank — each shot in head
latest_news.text: Israeli forces kill Mohammed (5) and Othman (7) alongside parents in Tammun. Each shot in the head. Troops reportedly said “We killed dogs.”

latest_news.headline: Iran claims US/Israel using copycat drones to frame it for regional attacks
latest_news.text: Iran claims US and Israel are using copycat “Lucas” drones to frame Iran for attacks in the region.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine to assess negotiation viability in 1-2 weeks — prolonged war likely
latest_news.text: Arakhamia says Ukraine will assess viability of Russia negotiations in 1-2 weeks. After that, country may enter prolonged war period.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls for naval coalition to open Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Trump urges Gulf oil-importing allies to deploy warships. Analysts say solution is fraught with problems.

latest_news.headline: 4 killed overnight in Lebanon as Israeli strikes continue
latest_news.text: Lebanese media report deadly overnight attacks. Efforts continue to find diplomatic solution. 826+ killed total.

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 16:04). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Trump threatens Kharg Island ‘just for fun’. Iran reveals 42K+ civilian sites damaged. Araghchi: strikes from UAE soil. Copycat drone claims. Zero diplomacy.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): 4 killed overnight. Palestinian family killed in West Bank. Sirens in central Israel. 826+ dead.

(3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 86 (RISING): 68 missiles + 282 bombs + 9,222 drones. 740 KIA. 144 engagements. US ceasefire talks stalled. Prolonged war assessment.

(4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped): 118K displaced.
(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78.
(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47. (8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25.

ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS. Day 16.
